title: dioscorea neglecta
intro: Dioscorea neglecta, also known as the wild yam, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Dioscorea neglecta include reducing menstrual cramps, improving fertility, and supporting immune function, among others. Dioscorea neglecta can be prepared in various forms, including dried root powder, capsules, and teas, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
